name: Do Lord
chorusText:
Do Lord “o” do Lord ‘O” do remember me
Do Lord “o” do Lord ‘O” do remember me
Do Lord “o” do Lord ‘O” do remember me
far beyond the blue

I’m baptised I’m ready and I’m longing to go
I’m baptised I’m ready and I’m longing to go
I’m baptised I’m ready and I’m longing to go
far beyond the blue

Glory Glory Halleluja
Glory Glory Halleluja
Glory Glory Halleluja
far beyond the blue
Say my brother will you meet me
Say my brother will you meet me
Far beyond the blue
Say my Sister will you meet me
Say my Sister will you meet me
Far beyond the blue
